name: Fetish
description: A tool or weapon empowered by a spirit bound within; the Merit's dots equal the fetish's level (one dot equals three talens). Multiple fetishes may be purchased at chargen so long as total dots don't exceed five.

name: Totem
description: A spirit bound in mutual service to the pack; dots are pooled across all pack members to increase the totem's power and capabilities. Full totem creation rules are in Chapter Three, pp. 186–195.

name: Wolf-Blooded
description: Your character carries strong werewolf ancestry; she gains the Unseen Sense Merit for free and her Willpower counts as two higher for resisting Lunacy. Drawback: she is exposed to creatures and phenomena she can't comprehend, suffering a –1 penalty to resist derangements from horrifying events.
